{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Eithan's robes
| introduced = cradle-03-blackflame
}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Eithan]] wears turquoise-and-gold robes.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c15">''Blackflame'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Eithan]] wears fine white-and-gold robes.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c13">''Uncrowned'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
